BUFN768 Special Topics in Finance (1-4 Credits) Selected experiential learning opportunities in advanced topics in the various ﬁelds of graduate study in ﬁnance. Prerequisite: Permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
